description: Advanced Security and critical-control governance dashboard.

options.content:
### Advanced Security and Critical-Control Governance
Track manual disablement, bypass and policy changes for push protection, CodeQL, secret scanning and other repository security controls.  
**Manual weakening should remain CRITICAL unless an approved automation exception lowers the final priority.**

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)

SELECT COUNT(*) value FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND review_priority='CRITICAL'

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', ''))) value

WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time) AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', ''))!=''
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'

)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1

    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'

END) = '${security_capability:raw}'

SELECT TIMESTAMP_TRUNC(event_time, DAY) time,
review_priority metric, COUNT(*) value
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)
GROUP BY time, metric
ORDER BY time

SELECT CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END security_capability, COUNT(*) events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1

    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)
GROUP BY security_capability ORDER BY events DESC

SELECT COALESCE(actor,'Unknown') actor_name, COUNT(*) events
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token

  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)
GROUP BY actor_name ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT event_time, review_priority,
CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END security_capability,
governance_event_type, action, actor initiated_by,
SPLIT(repository,'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] organization,
repository, review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
  AND review_priority='CRITICAL'
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 300

AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)
GROUP BY action ORDER BY events DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT e.event_time, e.actor, e.action, e.governance_event_type,
e.repository, e.review_priority, x.reason exception_reason, x.owner_team
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events` e
JOIN `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_review_exceptions` x
  ON x.is_active=TRUE
 AND LOWER(x.actor)=LOWER(COALESCE(e.actor,''))
 AND (x.action='*' OR LOWER(x.action)=LOWER(COALESCE(e.action,'')))
 AND (x.governance_event_type IS NULL OR x.governance_event_type='*'
      OR UPPER(x.governance_event_type)=UPPER(COALESCE(e.governance_event_type,'')))
WHERE $__timeFilter(e.event_time)
  AND (e.governance_area='ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
       OR e.governance_event_type='IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED')
ORDER BY e.event_time DESC
LIMIT 200

SELECT event_time, review_priority,
CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END security_capability,
governance_event_type, action, actor initiated_by,
repository, review_reason
FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
WHERE $__timeFilter(event_time)
AND (
  governance_area = 'ADVANCED_SECURITY_POSTURE'
  OR governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED'
)
AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
AND ('${actor:raw}' = 'ALL' OR actor = '${actor:raw}')
AND ('${review_priority:raw}' = 'ALL' OR review_priority = '${review_priority:raw}')
AND (
  '${security_capability:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR (CASE
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'PUSH_PROTECTION%' THEN 'Push protection'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'ADVANCED_SECURITY%' THEN 'Advanced Security'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'CODEQL%' OR governance_event_type LIKE 'CODE_SCANNING%' THEN 'CodeQL / code scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECRET_SCANNING%' THEN 'Secret scanning'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'SECURITY_CONFIGURATION%' THEN 'Security configuration'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDABOT%' THEN 'Dependabot security updates'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'VULNERABILITY_ALERTS%' THEN 'Vulnerability alerts'
  WHEN governance_event_type LIKE 'DEPENDENCY_GRAPH%' THEN 'Dependency graph'
  WHEN governance_event_type = 'IDENTITY_GUARDRAIL_DISABLED' THEN 'SAML / 2FA guardrails'
  ELSE 'Other security control'
END) = '${security_capability:raw}'
)
ORDER BY event_time DESC
LIMIT 500

list.name: organization
list.label: Organization

query.query:
WITH organizations AS (
  SELECT TRIM(org) organization FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND org IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(org)!=''
  UNION DISTINCT
  SELECT SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')),'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] organization
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository,''),',')) repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND STRPOS(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')),'/')>0
)
SELECT organization __text, organization __value
FROM (SELECT 'ALL' organization,0 sort_order UNION ALL
      SELECT DISTINCT organization,1 FROM organizations WHERE organization IS NOT NULL)
ORDER BY sort_order, organization LIMIT 5000

list.name: repository
list.label: Repository

query.query:
WITH repositories AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) repository_name
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository,''),',')) repository_token
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', ''))!=''
)
SELECT repository_name __text, repository_name __value
FROM (SELECT 'ALL' repository_name,0 sort_order UNION ALL
      SELECT repository_name,1 FROM repositories
      WHERE '${organization:raw}'='ALL'
         OR SPLIT(repository_name,'/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)]='${organization:raw}')
ORDER BY sort_order, repository_name LIMIT 10000

  SELECT DISTINCT TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) repository_name

  CROSS JOIN UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository,''),',')) repository_token

    AND TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', ''))!=''

list.name: actor
list.label: Actor

query.query:
SELECT actor_name __text, actor_name __value
FROM (
  SELECT 'ALL' actor_name,0 sort_order
  UNION ALL
  SELECT DISTINCT actor actor_name,1
  FROM `db-dev-l4to-mp-github.github_governance.github_governance_events`
  WHERE event_time >= TIMESTAMP_SUB(CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(), INTERVAL 180 DAY)
    AND actor IS NOT NULL AND TRIM(actor)!=''
    AND (
  '${organization:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR org = '${organization:raw}'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE SPLIT(TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')), '/')[SAFE_OFFSET(0)] = '${organization:raw}'
  )
)
    AND (
  '${repository:raw}' = 'ALL'
  OR EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM UNNEST(SPLIT(COALESCE(repository, ''), ',')) repository_token
    WHERE TRIM(REGEXP_REPLACE(repository_token, r'[\[\]\"]', '')) = '${repository:raw}'
  )
)
)
ORDER BY sort_order, actor_name LIMIT 10000

title: GitHub Governance — Advanced Security & Critical Controls
